title: Registered Broker Compliance Checklist
alt: Checklist of compliance duties for a registered medicines broker

items.label: Register with the MHRA
items.desc: Register before trading and appear on the public register

items.label: Operate a quality system
items.desc: Proportionate but genuine, with defined responsibilities and risk management

items.label: Verify both counterparties
items.desc: Confirm supplier and recipient are legally authorised to deal

items.label: Recall & complaint procedures
items.desc: Working processes to act on recalls, complaints and withdrawals

items.label: Report falsified medicines
items.desc: Inform the authority and MA holder of suspected falsified products

items.label: Keep traceable records
items.desc: Reconstruct the product pathway; meet ALCOA+ for inspection
